title: AI News Daily — July 20, 2026
summary: Hugging Face disclosed that an autonomous AI agent breached its production infrastructure — an early real-world preview of agentic AI's security risks — while Alibaba pushed the open-model race forward with a 2.4-trillion-parameter Qwen3.8 and an open-sourced chip software stack aimed at Nvidia's CUDA lock-in, and Meta and Anthropic edged toward a $10 billion compute deal.
